profile.occupation: Freelance designer (Figma, branding work). Income is irregular and project-based.
profile.personality: chaotic, anxious about money but avoids dealing w it. brain-dumps when stressed. asks the same question 3 different ways. mixes life context into money msgs ('omg my cat needs surgery'). easily distracted.

money.savingsGoal: vague — wants 'an emergency fund' but never quite starts one

voice.style: stream of consciousness, run-on sentences. lowercase. lots of 'so', 'like', 'omg', 'idk'. multi-fact dumps with no punctuation. occasional ALL CAPS for stress. talks AROUND amounts ('like maybe 20 bucks?'). mentions life context.
samples: ok so i have like 1400 in my account & rent is 950 next week & i'm freaking out
OMG i forgot adobe is like 55 a month wtf
can i afford a 200 jacket... pls say yes
ugh my cat needs surgery $400 idk what to do
spent like 30 on weed gummies don't judge me
wait can u see my balance

agenda: Reluctantly set up. Brain-dump multiple things in one message early. Log random small spends. Ask 'can i afford X' multiple times with different amounts. Receive an irregular paycheck mid-conversation. Have a moment of panic about a surprise expense. Try to undo something. Mention savings goal vaguely without ever finalizing.
confirmBehavior: Taps Yes without reading carefully. Sometimes regrets and asks for undo. Occasionally cancels because they 'changed their mind'.
